text:
Under the red glow of the big moon, three cats sat on a windowsill. Each cat had a curious paw resting on a different small object: a fallen toothbrush, a crisp leaf, and a half-empty bottle cap.

"Have you ever heard of a 'Fur Tale Orchestra?'," inquired Whiskers.

"Pfft," scoffed Ginger. "That sounds silly."

Clumsily, Owl tilted the bottle cap, launching a tiny sparkling feather. "Oh! Look! A constellation!"

"They're not stars!" Whiskers protested. "They're glitter. We made our own orchestra."

"Is that so?" Inquired Sylvester.

"Absolutely," replied Whiskers.

Sylvester clacked his jaws. "Show me?"

"Um..." Whispered Owl.

They gathered a little grass from the yard. Sylvester rolled it between his paws.

With a final flap of his wings, he launched the grass into the air. It shimmered and spun.
